2603.21728.title: EvoIdeator: Evolving Scientific Ideas through Checklist-Grounded Reinforcement Learning
2603.21728.paper_summary: Scientific idea generation is a cornerstone of autonomous knowledge discovery, yet the iterative evolution required to transform initial concepts into high-quality research proposals remains a formidable challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing Reinforcement Learning (RL) paradigms often rely on rubric-based scalar rewards that provide global quality scores but lack actionable granularity. Conversely, language-based refinement methods are typically confined to inference-time prompting, targeting models that are not explicitly optimized to internalize such critiques. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{EvoIdeator}, a framework that facilitates the evolution of scientific ideas by aligning the RL training objective with \textbf{checklist-grounded feedback}. EvoIdeator leverages a structured judge model to generate two synergistic signals: (1) \emph{lexicographic rewards} for multi-dimensional optimization, and (2) \emph{fine-grained language feedback} that offers span-level critiques regarding grounding, feasibility, and methodological rigor. By integrating these signals into the RL loop, we condition the policy to systematically utilize precise feedback during both optimization and inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EvoIdeator, built on Qwen3-4B, significantly outperforms much larger frontier models across key scientific metrics. Crucially, the learned policy exhibits strong generalization to diverse external feedback sources without further fine-tuning, offering a scalable and rigorous path toward self-refining autonomous ideation.
2603.21728.paper_summary_zh: 科學創意生成是自主知識發現的基石，但將初始概念轉化為高質量研究提案所需的迭代演變對於大型語言模型（LLMs）來說仍然是一項艱巨的挑戰。現有的強化學習（RL）範式通常依賴於基於標準的標量獎勵，這些獎勵提供全球質量分數，但缺乏可操作的細節。相反，基於語言的精煉方法通常僅限於推理時的提示，針對那些未明確優化以內化此類批評的模型。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了\textbf{EvoIdeator}，這是一個通過將RL訓練目標與\textbf{檢查表基礎的反饋}對齊來促進科學創意演變的框架。EvoIdeator利用結構化的評判模型生成兩個協同信號：（1）\emph{詞典獎勵}以進行多維優化，和（2）\emph{細緻的語言反饋}，提供有關基礎、可行性和方法論嚴謹性的範圍級批評。通過將這些信號整合到RL循環中，我們使策略在優化和推理過程中系統性地利用精確的反饋。廣泛的實驗表明，基於Qwen3-4B構建的EvoIdeator在關鍵科學指標上顯著超越了更大型的前沿模型。關鍵是，所學的策略對各種外部反饋來源展現出強大的泛化能力，而無需進一步微調，提供了一條可擴展且嚴謹的自我精煉自主創意的途徑。
2603.21728.author: Andreas Sauter et.al.
2603.21728.authors: Andreas Sauter, Yuyue Zhao, Jacopo Urbani, Wenxiang Hu, Zaiqiao Meng, Lun Zhou, Xiaohui Yan, Yougang Lyu
